title: Total War THREE KINGDOMS
shortDescription: Unite Ancient China under your rule through a thrilling blend of turn-based empire building and real-time battles. Use the Guanxi System and diplomacy to forge alliances, and build powerful armies with hundreds of unique infantry, cavalry and war machine units.
detailedDescriptionHtml:
Total War: THREE KINGDOMS is the first in the multi award-winning strategy series to recreate epic conflict across ancient China. Combining a gripping turn-based campaign game of empire-building, statecraft and conquest with stunning real-time battles, Total War: THREE KINGDOMS redefines the series in an age of heroes and legends.



China in 190CE

Welcome to a new era of legendary conquest.

This beautiful but fractured land calls out for a new emperor and a new way of life. Unite China under your rule, forge the next great dynasty, and build a legacy that will last through the ages.
Choose from a cast of 12 legendary Warlords and conquer the realm. Recruit heroic characters to aide your cause and dominate your enemies on military, technological, political, and economic fronts.

Will you build powerful friendships, form brotherly alliances, and earn the respect of your many foes? Or would you rather commit acts of treachery, inflict heart-wrenching betrayals, and become a master of grand political intrigue?

Your legend is yet to be written, but one thing is certain: glorious conquest awaits.

ANCIENT CHINA RECREATED





Discover Three Kingdoms China, a land of breath-taking natural beauty. Battle across lush subtropics, arid deserts and snow-capped mountains. Marvel at legendary landmarks like the Great Wall of China and the Yangtze River. Explore the length and breadth of ancient China as you restore harmony to its embattled landscape.

CHINA’S GREATEST LEGENDS





Forge a new empire as one of 12 legendary Warlords drawn from China’s celebrated historical epic, the Romance of the Three Kingdoms. Peerless commanders, powerful warriors and eminent statesmen, these characters each have a unique playstyle and objectives. Recruit an epic supporting cast of heroes to command your armies, govern your provinces and strengthen your growing empire. Characters are the beating heart of the game, and China’s very future will be shaped by its champions.

GUANXI SYSTEM





Modelled on Guanxi, the Chinese concept of dynamic inter-relationships, Total War: THREE KINGDOMS takes a paradigm-shifting approach to character agency, with iconic, larger-than-life heroes and their relationships defining the future of ancient China. Each of these characters is brought to life with their own unique personality, motivations, and likes/dislikes. They also form their own deep relationships with each other, both positive and negative, that shape how your story plays out.

ARTISTIC PURITY





With stunning visuals and flamboyant Wushu combat, THREE KINGDOMS is the art of war. With beautiful UI, vibrant vistas and authentic Chinese-inspired artwork, this reimagining of ancient China is a visual feast.

REAL-TIME & TURN-BASED HARMONY





The turn-based campaign and real-time battles of Total War: THREE KINGDOMS are more interconnected than ever before. Actions in battle now have much greater consequences, affecting your Heroes’ relationship towards you, as well as the friendships and rivalries they develop with other characters. In a world where powerful allies are one of the keys to success, this adds a brand-new element to how victory is achieved.
aboutTheGameHtml:
Total War: THREE KINGDOMS is the first in the multi award-winning strategy series to recreate epic conflict across ancient China. Combining a gripping turn-based campaign game of empire-building, statecraft and conquest with stunning real-time battles, Total War: THREE KINGDOMS redefines the series in an age of heroes and legends.

supportedLanguagesHtml:
English*, French*, Italian, German*, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Korean*, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese, Turkish
*languages with full audio support

pcRequirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 64 Bit
  • Processor: Intel Core 2 Duo 3.00Ghz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX 650 Ti 1GB|HD 7850 1GB|Intel UHD Graphics 620
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 60 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: 6GB Memory if using integrated GPU.
pcRequirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64 Bit
  • Processor: Intel i5-6600 | Ryzen 5 2600X
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX 970 | R9 Fury X 4GB VRAM
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 60 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Microsoft no longer supports Windows 10 or older versions.

macRequirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: macOS 10.14.4
  • Processor: 2GHz Intel Core i5
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 2GB Nvidia 680MX, 2GB AMD R9 M290, 1.5GB Intel Iris Graphics 540 or better (see notes for more details)
  • Storage: 52 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: The game is officially supported on the following Macs. To check your Mac model and when it was released, select About This Mac from the Apple menu on your menu bar.
    • * All 13" MacBook Pros released since 2016
    • * All 15" MacBook Pros released since Late 2013 with a 2GB graphics card or better
    • * All 21.5" iMacs released since 2017
    • * All 27" iMacs released since Late 2012 with a 2GB graphics card or better
    • * All 27" iMac Pros released since 2017
    • * All Mac Pros released since Late 2013
    Please note for your computer to meet the minimum requirements it must match or better all elements of the listed spec. For more detailed specifications check the Feral website.

linuxRequirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 18.04 64-bit
  • Processor: 3.4GHz Intel Core i3-4130
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 2GB AMD R9 285 (GCN 3rd Generation), 2GB Nvidia GTX 680
  • Storage: 60 GB available space
  • Additional Notes:
    • * Requires Vulkan
    • * Nvidia requires 418.56 or newer drivers.
    • * AMD requires Mesa 19.0.1. ​
    • * AMD GCN 3rd Gen GPU's include the R9 285, 380, 380X, Fury, Nano, Fury X.
    • * Intel GPUs are not supported at time of release.
    • * Other modern drivers and distributions are expected to work but are not officially supported.
linuxRequirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Ubuntu 18.04 64-bit
  • Processor: 3.4GHz Intel Core i7-4770
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 4GB AMD RX 480, 4GB Nvidia GTX 970
  • Storage: 60 GB available space
  • Additional Notes:
    • * Requires Vulkan
    • * Nvidia requires 418.56 or newer drivers.
    • * AMD requires Mesa 19.0.1. ​
    • * AMD GCN 3rd Gen GPU's include the R9 285, 380, 380X, Fury, Nano, Fury X.
    • * Intel GPUs are not supported at time of release.
    • * Other modern drivers and distributions are expected to work but are not officially supported.

newsItems.title: Medieval 3 may be on the way, but how many characters can you name in Creative Assembly's masterpiece, Total War: Three Kingdoms?
newsItems.author: Sean Martin
newsItems.contents: Us Total War fans are eating good at the moment; we've got Total War: Medieval 3, Total War: Warhammer 40,000, and a hefty End Times update for Total War: Warhammer on the way. These all might still be a ways off, but it's exciting to know there are big Total War games on the horizon and, however fun Pharoah Dynasties was, no more of these small saga games... Read more.

items.displayName: The Empire, Long Divided, Must Unite
items.description: Playing as any faction, declare yourself Emperor of the Three Kingdoms.
Playing as any faction, become emperor and win the game.
Playing as any faction, declare yourself emperor.
Playing as any faction, someone else declares themselves emperor before you.
Playing as one of the governor factions, become emperor.
Playing as Dong Zhuo, raze an emperor seat.
Playing as any faction, capture a region.
Playing as any faction, destroy any other faction.
Playing as any faction, progress a character to the maximum rank.
Playing as any faction, unlock an entire single element of the reforms tree.
Playing as any faction, win 66 duels.
Playing as any faction, turn a friend into a rival.
Playing as any faction, capture 29 settlements.
Playing as any faction, win a ranked match in multiplayer mode.
Playing as any faction, control all jade resources on the map.
Playing as any faction, control a single spice resource.
Playing as any faction, control two spice resources.
Playing as any faction, control all 3 spice resources on the map.
Playing as any faction, construct a faction palace.
Playing as any faction, win a multiplayer co-op campaign.
Playing as any faction, successfully ambush and defeat any opponent.
Playing as any faction, trigger a civil war in another faction.
Playing as any faction, win 100 battles launched from the campaign map.
Playing as any faction, complete a campaign on legendary difficulty.
Playing as any faction, make 8,888 income in a single turn.
Playing as Dong Zhuo, raze 11 settlements.
Playing as Cao Cao, trigger a proxy war.
Playing as Yuan Shao, form 6 alliances.
Playing as any faction, breach a wall during a battle.
Playing as any faction, kill 92,413 enemies.
Playing as any faction, capture 9413 enemies.
Playing as any faction, unlock every reform in a single playthough.
Playing as any faction, make your spy become faction leader.
Playing as Liu Bei, make 6 allies.
Playing as Gongsun Zan, win 11 battles with White Horse Fellows.
Playing as Zheng Jiang, construct a bandit lair.
Fight a battle with Liu Bei, Guan Yu, and Zhang Fei fighting on the same side.
With Lü Bu in your party, defeat Dong Zhuo in battle.
Playing as any faction, have all 5 Tiger Generals (Guan Yu, Zhang Fei, Zhao Yun, Ma Chao, Huang Zhong) in your faction.
Playing as any faction, control all northern horse resources on the map.
Playing as the child of Cao Cao, proclaim yourself emperor.
Playing as any faction, defeat Dong Zhuo.
Playing as any faction, execute 24 captives.
Playing as any faction, win a campaign having declared war on every faction as soon as you encounter them.
Playing as any faction, win 222 battles in multiplayer mode.

items.displayName: When the Sun Rises in the West
items.description: Playing as any faction, win every battle (including auto-resolve battles).
Playing as any faction, form an alliance.
Playing as any faction, win a multiplayer match.
Playing as any faction, have a spy successfully complete an assassination.
Playing as any faction, win a single battle with one of each unit type (Melee Cavalry; Shock Cavalry; Melee Infantry; Glaive & Spear Infantry; Ranged).
Playing as any faction, attack Xiahou Dun with archers.
Playing as any faction, obtain the maximum level in any one character attribute.
Playing as any faction, kill a Hero with a special ability.
Playing as any faction, maintain 8 trade routes.
Playing as a Yellow Turban faction, construct at least 8 Prosperous Farming Estates.
Playing as a Yellow Turban faction, construct a Concealed Fort.

items.displayName: There Will Be Fish Every Year
items.description: Playing as a Yellow Turban faction, construct a Grand Fishing Port.

items.displayName: Dù Zǐténg Will See You Now
items.description: Playing as a Yellow Turban faction, construct a House of Compassion.
Playing as a Yellow Turban faction, construct a Garden of Divine Peace.
Playing as a Yellow Turban faction, construct at least 7 Communal Squares.
Playing as a Yellow Turban faction, recruit at least 7 Youxia units.
Playing as a Yellow Turban faction, construct a Yellow Turban Headquarters.

items.displayName: A Battle A Day Keeps The Doctor Away
items.description: Playing as any faction, win 7 battles with a Healer-type Hero leading your army.
Playing as a Yellow Turban faction, unlock all Heaven reforms.
Playing as a Yellow Turban faction, unlock all People reforms.
Playing as a Yellow Turban faction, unlock all Land reforms.
Playing as a Yellow Turban faction, become the Yellow Sky Emperor.
Playing as a Yellow Turban faction, complete a campaign.
Playing as Dong Zhuo Raze Luoyang.
Playing as the Han Dynasty win the campaign.
Play as a Jiazi Rebellion faction and win the campaign.
Playing as any Eight Princes faction, win the game by any means.
Playing as any Eight Princes faction, research all military reforms.
Playing as any Eight Princes, research all espionage reforms.
Playing as any Eight Princes faction, research all civic reforms.
Playing as any Eight Princes faction, recruit 10 Cataphract units to your armies.
Playing as any Eight Princes faction, construct the Grand Inspector's Palace.
Playing as any Eight Princes faction, capture the settlement of Luoyang.
Playing as any Eight Princes faction, obtain more than 225 in any alignment.
Playing as any Eight Princes faction, become the emperor then win the game.
Playing as any Eight Princes faction, become regent then win the game.
Playing as Lu Zhi, collect all books.
Playing as Prince Liu Chong, collect all trophies.
As Lü Bu kill a character from your kill list
As Lü Bu Kill 25 characters from your kill list
As Lü Bu attack and win three battles in one turn
Reach greatness like your father and achieve five of Sun Ce ambitions before the end of year 200

items.displayName: You Killed My Father, Prepare To Die!
items.description: As Sun Ce kill Huang Zu (In duel or battle)

items.displayName: Fear the Tiger more than the government
items.description: As Yan Baihu destroy Sun Ce faction
As Yan Baihu, achieve the highest level of the White Tiger Confederation pooled resource
Give out five titles to five different characters
Use "Share the spoils" when the army loot has reached max loot
Win the game with a bandit faction
During a Nanman campaign, have all Nanman fealties under your control

items.displayName: That Still Only Counts as One
items.description: Win a battle against an opponent fielding at least one elephant unit, or an opponent fielding a general that has an elephant as their mount
Win a battle where an entire retinue was made up of tiger units
When playing as Shi Xie, have 4 vassals that are also members of your family at the start of a turn
During a Nanman campaign, complete a tech tree where all major reforms are to one side
Playing as a Nanman, become the emperor of the Han, or establish the Nanman kingdom
